chunks.title: Lament over Physical Affliction
chunks.reason: The psalmist describes the physical and emotional consequences of God's discipline.

chunks.title: Isolation from Friends
chunks.reason: The psalmist details the alienation experienced from friends and enemies.

chunks.title: Confession and Hope
chunks.reason: The psalmist expresses trust in God while confessing sin and noting the strength of enemies.

chunks.title: Final Plea for Help
chunks.reason: The psalm concludes with a direct prayer for God's immediate intervention.
